summary: M462 — Auto-flag openai regens for review + site overview doc. Critical workflow fix: openai-spritesheet-gen.py was writing only to the sidecar (Current tab) but never enrolling in the open review batch (Pending tab), so the user couldn't review the 5 already-regenerated characters (frost_wyrmling, ash_wraith, bandit_captain, bandit, void_shade). Added register_open_batch_entries() to the script so every future regen auto-enrolls. One-shot scripts/flag-openai-regens-for-review.py retroactively flagged 54 pose entries for the 5 existing characters. Also wrote game13/memory/SITE_OVERVIEW.md as the cold-start manual covering every tool page, image pipeline, manifest, build step, and maintenance location; added a memory pointer (emberveil_site_map.md) so I read SITE_OVERVIEW.md before acting on any Emberveil request.
